title: Monitor livestock to parturition
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor livestock to parturition demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Check health status of animals

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Check condition and health status of animals and confirm according to workplace health strategies and records

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check condition and health status of animals and confirm according to workplace health strategies and records.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise signs of poor health and condition or abnormal behaviour and report to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer preventative health treatments as instructed.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with production and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications associated with production and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with production and report to supervisor.

elements.title: Feed pregnant animals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify nutritional needs of pregnant animals and confirm against feeding plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a safe and secure environment for pregnant animals.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle animals with minimum stress and discomfort according to workplace animal welfare procedures.
